scripts.db:local:reset: pnpm exec wrangler d1 execute kotoba-gym --local --config apps/server/wrangler.jsonc --command "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS sessions; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS themes; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS d1_migrations;"
scripts.db:local:migrate: pnpm exec wrangler d1 migrations apply kotoba-gym --local --config apps/server/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.db:local:fresh: pnpm run db:local:reset && pnpm run db:local:migrate
scripts.build: pnpm -C packages/core build && pnpm -C apps/server build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm -C packages/core typecheck && pnpm -C apps/server typecheck && pnpm -C apps/mobile typecheck
scripts.lint: pnpm -C packages/core lint && pnpm -C apps/server lint && pnpm -C apps/mobile lint && biome check AGENTS.md package.json tsconfig.json pnpm-workspace.yaml vitest.config.ts docs
